Opcode.name: PCM_OP_CUST_DELETE_PAYINFO
Opcode.Doc: This opcode deletes payinfo objects. Note that a payinfo object that is currently associated with a billinfo object cannot be deleted; the billinfo object must be deleted first. For /payinfo/sepa type, the object will not be deleted in-case there is a transaction (/sepa/dd) object in pending status associated with the payinfo.

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_POID
Poid.Doc: Poid of the payinfo object to be deleted.

Substruct.name: PIN_FLD_CONTEXT_INFO
Substruct.Doc: Substruct to pass information from external clients.

String.name: PIN_FLD_CORRELATION_ID
String.Doc: Correlation id passed by an external system to BRM.

String.name: PIN_FLD_EXTERNAL_USER
String.Doc: User of an external system connecting to BRM.

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_POID
Poid.Doc: Poid of the payinfo object that was deleted.

Int.name: PIN_FLD_RESULT
Int.Doc: Currency resource that this rate plan impacts

Substruct.name: PIN_FLD_CONTEXT_INFO
Substruct.Doc: Substruct to pass information from external clients.

String.name: PIN_FLD_CORRELATION_ID
String.Doc: Correlation id passed by an external system to BRM.

String.name: PIN_FLD_EXTERNAL_USER
String.Doc: User of an external system connecting to BRM.
